item.title: Senior Backend Engineer
item.description: Job Description Position Overview: MyOme is looking for an experienced and pragmatic individual to join our integrations and portal team. This position will help enable patients and providers to order testing and understand results, bringing clarity and ease of use to complex genetics results. The successful candidate will demonstrate knowledge of healthcare data and an eagerness to build value through fast prototyping and iteration. What You'll Do: Add new features to our backend systems to sup
item.location: Remote, Remote in the United States, Colorado, United States

item.title: Senior Python/DevOps Engineer (100% Remote - USA Only), Six Feet Up
item.guid: senior python devops engineer 100 remote usa only|six feet up
item.description: Job Title Senior Python/DevOps Engineer (100% Remote - USA Only) Job Description Six Feet Up is seeking a seasoned Python/DevOps Engineer (100% remote, USA only) who can work across software development, architecture, cloud infrastructure, data, AI, and client collaboration. This role is for an experienced engineering generalist: someone with deep expertise who is not limited to one framework, platform, or layer of the stack. You are comfortable entering unfamiliar systems, clarifying ambiguous

item.title: Python + TypeScript Engineers
item.description: Job Description Fusionbox is a software engineering consultancy that builds enterprise software the right way. We negotiate the right to open source all our client code, maintain a handful of popular libraries, and our engineers contribute to Django core. We sponsor PyCon, DjangoCon, and Django Girls because we're invested in the ecosystem we build on. We're looking for software engineers who value software design, system architecture, and collaboration. You should be strong in most of these are
item.location: Remote, Remote (US Based), Any US State, US

item.title: Senior Python Engineer, EPAM
item.description: Job Title Senior Python Engineer Job Description We are seeking a Senior Python Engineer who brings strong backend development expertise along with a solid grasp of cloud-native solutions. The right candidate will be capable of designing, building and maintaining scalable backend services through Python and modern cloud platforms. Countries : Argentina, Australia, Bulgaria, Canada, Chile, China, Colombia, Czech Republic, Greece, Hong Kong, Japan, Malaysia, Mexico,Romania, Singapore, Slovakia, Uk

item.title: Founding ML/Data Scientist (Remote, UK), MyDataValue
item.guid: founding ml data scientist remote|uk mydatavalue
item.description: Job Title Founding ML/Data Scientist (Remote, UK) Job Description We're an AI-driven hospitality tech platform helping vacation rental owners automate their revenue on Booking.com and Airbnb. We sit on Booking.com private API data, Airbnb channel data, and scraped competitive pricing across thousands of properties — and right now we barely use it. Our agent is rules-based where it should be data-driven, and our promotions engine has no model behind it. We're looking for a founding ML/Data Scient

item.title: Freelance Full-Stack Web App Developer
item.guid: freelance full stack web app developer|mindrift
item.description: Mindrift is looking for skilled Full-Stack Web App Developers (JavaScript/TypeScript + Python or Node) to join the Tendem project ( Tendem.ai ) and build interactive browser-based applications in a hybrid AI + human environment. The role (“AI Pilot”) involves collaborating with Tendem Agents that handle repetitive tasks, while the developer provides full-stack engineering expertise, architectural judgment, and quality control to ensure web apps are functional, robust, and ready for real users.
